title: clematis × triternata f. rubromarginata
intro: Clematis × triternata f. rubromarginata is a variety of flowering plant in the buttercup family, known for its large, showy purple flowers and red margins. This plant has been used in herbal medicine, where its roots and stems contain glycosides and alkaloids that exhibit medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Clematis × triternata f. rubromarginata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
